name: Arjun Sharma
bio: Arjun Sharma is a seasoned politician with over 20 years of experience in public service. He focuses on economic reform and sustainable urban development.
education: Masters in Economics, Delhi School of Economics

issueStances.economy: Supports controlled privatization and tech-driven job creation.
issueStances.healthcare: Advocates for universal healthcare insurance models.
issueStances.education: Promotes digital literacy in rural schools.

name: Sarah Williams
bio: Sarah Williams has led numerous grassroots campaigns for environmental protection and social equity. She is a strong voice for climate action.
education: B.S. in Environmental Science, Yale University

issueStances.economy: Proposes a 'Green New Deal' for renewable energy jobs.
issueStances.education: Focuses on vocational training in sustainable technologies.
